news.title: Buyer snaps up Josh Duhamel’s $3 million L.A. home as actor embraces his Minnesota ‘doomsday prepper’ cabin
news.summary: “Ransom Canyon” star Josh Duhamel’s Los Angeles home has come under offer just days after it was put on the market—as the actor and his family continue to spend more time living at their rural off-grid cabin.

news.title: Chinese startup Moonshot AI unveils Kimi model it says rivals OpenAI, Anthropic
news.summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

news.title: Fighter jet maker Saab smashes expectations as CEO urges procurement rethink
news.summary: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.

news.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
news.summary: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

news.title: BP, ConocoPhillips to back Iraq with major investments as U.S. seeks to weaken Iran's energy hold
news.summary: BP and ConocoPhillips are set to announce billions of dollars of new investments in Iraq on Friday.

news.title: SoftBank sinks over 9% as Asia chip stocks track Wall Street AI sell-off
news.summary: The declines followed another weak session for U.S. technology stocks, with the Nasdaq Composite falling 1.47% as semiconductor shares came under renewed pressure.

news.title: Stock futures fall as global chip sell-off continues: Live updates
news.summary: The moves come after a decline in chipmakers dragged the broader market lower and the U.S. continued to strike Iran overnight.

news.title: Oil prices rise as U.S.-Iran hostilities threaten supply through Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Oil prices rose Friday as investors weighed escalating threats between the U.S. and Iran.

news.title: Seven & i shares end 3.6% higher on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
news.summary: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.

news.title: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
news.summary: China will provide developing countries with 5,000 opportunities in AI training and seminar programs, as well as develop AI cooperation with various blocs.

news.title: World’s largest olive oil company says market has 'definitively' entered new phase
news.summary: The update comes as analysts raise concerns about the prospect of global olive oil supplies swinging dramatically from one season to the next.

news.title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
news.summary: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.

news.title: Trump doubles down on 2020 election claims in national address, alleging China meddling
news.summary: Trump also repeated his calls for the Republican-led Congress to pass the "SAVE America Act," a controversial election bill that lacks support to pass.

news.title: AAPL Stock Hits Fresh Record As July Rally Nears Best Month In Nearly 4 Years — HSBC Sees Another 10% Upside
news.summary: Apple shares have climbed over 15% this month, the second highest move among the Magnificent Seven stocks.

news.title: Micron has turned into ‘the most important stock in the market.’ So is it time to worry?

news.title: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over Kalshi bets allegations, White House says
news.summary: Kalshi retained most of the profits, which were more than $90,000, from the trades made on public statements by President Trump.

news.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
news.summary: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.

news.title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
news.summary: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days." SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.

news.title: Netflix is getting stingier about its viewing data, and Wall Street isn’t happy
news.summary: Netflix’s stock is falling in the wake of mixed earnings and a new plan to cut back on the publication of ‘What We Watched’ reports.
